description: Create a synchronous facade channel named 'MPI_Facade' that bridges HL7 v2 and a REST API. The channel should use a TCP Listener on port 6661 as the source and an HTTP Sender targeting http://localhost:9000/patients (POST) as the destination. The channel must return the response from the destination back to the source. Inbound HL7 ADT messages must be converted to JSON with the format: {"mrn": "<PID-3.1>", "firstName": "<PID-5.2>", "lastName": "<PID-5.1>"}. The API's JSON response ({"status": "success", "mpi_uuid": "<UUID>"}) must be transformed into a custom HL7 ACK message containing an MSA segment: MSA|AA|<mpi_uuid>|. Deploy the channel upon completion.
